channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 25/26/27: track damage
item.description: Line: 25 only operates between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Kagran. Line: 26 currently does not operate between Zanggasse and Josef-Baumann-Gasse. [On 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line: 25 only operates between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Kagran. Line: 26 currently does not operate between Zanggasse and Josef-Baumann-Gasse.
[On 30.06.2026]

item.title: 98A: construction works
item.description: The line 98A is redirected in both directions between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Jägermaiszufahrt via Biberhaufenweg - Plattensteinergasse - Lobaugasse. [On 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The line 98A is redirected in both directions between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Jägermaiszufahrt via Biberhaufenweg - Plattensteinergasse - Lobaugasse.
[On 30.06.2026]

item.title: 57A: roadworks
item.description: Because of roadworks in the Gumpendorfer Straße between Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz and Laimgrubengasse, the line 57A operating short-running becomes the line Laimgrubengasse. [07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks in the Gumpendorfer Straße between Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz and Laimgrubengasse, the line 57A operating short-running becomes the line Laimgrubengasse.
[07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]

item.title: 10A: delays
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle. [On 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle.
[On 30.06.2026]

item.title: 66A/N66: Grenzackerstraße
item.description: Stop change of lines 66A and N66 towards Liesing S Stop: Grenzackerstraße From: Laxenburger Straße 104 to Raxstraße To: about 30 Meter towards … [13.07.2026 – 13.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of lines 66A and N66 towards Liesing S Stop: Grenzackerstraße From: Laxenburger Straße 104 to Raxstraße To: about 30 Meter towards …
[13.07.2026 – 13.07.2027]

item.title: 76B/79A/79B: roadworks
item.description: Because of construction works in the Margentinstraße, the lines 76B, 79A and 79B are being redirected. [07.07.2026 – 01.09.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Margentinstraße, the lines 76B, 79A and 79B are being redirected.
[07.07.2026 – 01.09.2027]

item.title: 11/71: track construction works (phase 2)
item.description: Because of track construction works in the Simmeringer Hauptstraße, short tours occur in the evening hours Monday to Friday on the lines 11 and 71 (22:30-01:00). Period … [29.06.2026 – 29.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works in the Simmeringer Hauptstraße, short tours occur in the evening hours Monday to Friday on the lines 11 and 71 (22:30-01:00). Period …
[29.06.2026 – 29.08.2026]

item.title: N41: track construction works Spitalgasse
item.description: Due to extensive track construction works in the range Spitalgasse there is an diversion of the line N41. Period: From Tuesday, 8. July 2026 Start of operation … [07.07.2026 – 06.09.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to extensive track construction works in the range Spitalgasse there is an diversion of the line N41. Period: From Tuesday, 8. July 2026 Start of operation …
[07.07.2026 – 06.09.2027]

item.title: Gentzgasse from Aumannplatz and Lazaristengasse to Köhlergasse
item.description: Since the affected tram lines will also be discontinued during the period from 4. May 2026 to 27. June 2026, Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG will have a … [27.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Since the affected tram lines will also be discontinued during the period from 4. May 2026 to 27. June 2026, Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG will have a …
[27.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]

item.title: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Gänserndorf
item.description: construction works between Gänserndorf train station and Deutsch Wagram train station from Gänserndorf09.2026 (00:10 clock) to 05.10.2026 (04:20 clock) some local trains … [Since 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
construction works between Gänserndorf train station and Deutsch Wagram train station from Gänserndorf09.2026 (00:10 clock) to 05.10.2026 (04:20 clock) some local trains …
[Since 24.06.2026]
